I've tried similar products from other brands and nothing comes close to this level of craftsmanship.

TERRIBLE! This is the worst product I have ever purchased in my entire life. It broke on the very first day. The material is so thin you can almost see through it. I tried to contact customer service and was on hold for 45 minutes before giving up. My email is sarah.mitchell.personal@gmail.com if anyone from the company wants to actually help me.
